name: standards-conformance report dry-run prints the planned report without writing the file to disk
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --dry-run --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && [ ! -f STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md ] && grep -q 'planned: write STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
